endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Wave 22 closes the elemental-monkey-trio at full 6-of-6 canonical species coverage — Simipour (DAA-042) joins as the last missing species (Water-type evolved form, see-no-evil), and a second Pansear print (DAA-026, volcanic-cave-dweller flavor) lands alongside. The trio is now the BBL corpus's first fully-completed designer-coordinated Pokemon species cycle; node body re-headlined as 'Corpus coverage: 6 of 6 canonical species (complete)'; Caveats reorganized to retire the 'not yet in inventory' bullet and document the full acquisition arc (waves 17 + 21 + 22). Both new cards stamped with characters: [elemental-monkey-trio] frontmatter pointers. Cohort is Discrete-Lair-ready at full canonical coverage.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Elemental monkeys page; per-species Simipour and Pansear pages]
notes: Cohort completion is a milestone. The trio went from five-of-six with a documented Simipour gap to complete-canonical-set in a single wave. This is the BBL corpus's first 'closed' designer-coordinated species cycle. The stack now anchors a Discrete Lair at full coverage rather than as a partial-cohort sampler. Behold.
